nasb.text: They were also to provide mounts to put Paul on and bring him safely to Felix the governor.

esv.text: Also provide mounts for Paul to ride and bring him safely to Felix the governor.”

cnv.text: 也要預備好牲口，好讓保羅騎上，護送他安全到達腓力斯總督那裡。”

ccb.text: 要给保罗预备坐骑，护送他安全抵达腓利斯总督那里。”

csbs.text: 也要预备牲口，让保罗骑上，护送到总督菲利克斯那里去。”
